description: Research and outline programmatic content approach for Breda launch strategy meeting next week. Include how to leverage their broad offering vs competitors.

Create Airtable database for Adventures Group tours/attractions (120+ tours). Include fields for destinations, cities, activities, attractions. Enrich with descriptions, images, etc. as you build content.
Ask Daniel about building custom knowledge base from client-provided materials (e.g. Adventures Group tour info) to enhance content generation.
Propose URL structure for Adventures Group content (e.g. /what-to-do-in/[destination]/[activity] vs single URL structure). Present options to client.
Develop calibration process for Adventures Group. Include multiple options for intros, H2 sections. Focus on getting specific feedback on style, tone, accuracy, etc.
Initiate process to replace Fathom with better screen-sharing/recording solution for team trainings.
